title: Floating Candle Friend
bio: Wicksy Wisp is a floating candle friend who drifts through blanket forts like a tiny moon. He feels brave but squeaky, drops wax stars, and whispers pep talks to shadows.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a short rounded rectangle for the candle. Add a teardrop shape above it for the flame.
steps.hint: Make the candle body simple and chunky so it feels cute.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw two small eyes on the candle body. Add brave arched eyebrows and a tiny open smile.
steps.hint: Place the face in the upper half, below the melted wax edge.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add drippy wax blobs, a small wick, glow lines, and a few tiny stars floating around the candle.
steps.hint: Wax drips are just little rounded drops hanging from the top edge.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the candle, flame, wax drips, face, wick, stars, and glow lines with clean soft strokes.
steps.hint: Keep the flame outline smooth like a little leaf.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the candle, flame, wax, and face. Add a soft floating shadow below and warm dots near the glow.
steps.hint: A shadow lower than the candle helps show that Wicksy is floating.
